message:
fix(todo): use getStore() instead of nil global store variable

The todo command was using the uninitialized global store variable instead
of calling getStore() which properly initializes the storage backend.

Fixes #1650

Co-authored-by: maphew <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
